chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 78 - وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال: إن المؤمنين إذا التقيا فتصافحا أدخل الله يده فصافح أشدهما حبا لصاحبه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 78. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: When two believers meet and shake hands, Allah puts His Hand in between and it is shaken by the one who loves the other the most.
